summary: A roughly two-minute sit-down interview with CBP Assistant Director Patricio D. Traversone-Di Benedetto, shot against a dark studio backdrop with a name lower-third and subtitles, for DHS Pride and LGBTQIA+ Pride Month. He recounts his career and coming out in law enforcement since the late 1990s. It is a static interview with no music.
notable_text: Patricio D. Traversone-Di Benedetto, Assistant Director, Advanced Training Center, Customs and Border Protection; 'it's fantastic that we're here in 2024 making a difference for all of our employees'
